name: localhub
description: Automatic local file versioning without Git commands

commands.title: Toggle Star — find all starred versions via ⭐ button in toolbar above
Show Starred Versions — click a version to open file or jump to its TM Group
Zombie TM Groups: Inactive (Click to Show)
Zombie TM Groups: Active (Click to Hide)
Empty Trash (Delete All History of Deleted Files)

viewsWelcome.contents:
No deleted files found.
Files that were deleted from disk but have saved history will appear here.

No plugins installed.
[Install Plugin](command:localhub.installPlugin)

Plugins extend LocalHub functionality.
[Browse Marketplace](command:localhub.browsePlugins)
Open or restore a folder to start LocalHub project features.

No file history yet.
[Create Snapshot](command:localhub.snapshot)
Open a file and start editing - snapshots are created automatically!

No tracked files yet.
Start editing files and they will appear here automatically.

No confirmed groups yet.
Click OK to confirm pending changes into a group.

No project open.
Use File History actions to open, create, restore, or initialize a project.

No branches yet.
Use File History → Initialize Project to create 'main' branch and snapshot all files.

view/title.when: view == localhubHistory || view == localhubFiles || view == localhubPending || view == localhubGroups
view == localhubFiles || view == localhubGroups || view == localhubBranches

view/item/context.when: view == localhubGroups && (viewItem == group || viewItem == forgottenGroup || viewItem == branchHeadGroup || viewItem == branchHeadReturnGroup)
view == localhubGroups && (viewItem == group || viewItem == forgottenGroup || viewItem == branchHeadGroup || viewItem == branchHeadReturnGroup)
view == localhubGroups && (viewItem == group || viewItem == forgottenGroup || viewItem == branchHeadGroup || viewItem == branchHeadReturnGroup)
view == localhubGroups && (viewItem == group || viewItem == forgottenGroup || viewItem == branchHeadGroup || viewItem == branchHeadReturnGroup)
view == localhubGroups && (viewItem == group || viewItem == forgottenGroup || viewItem == branchHeadGroup || viewItem == branchHeadReturnGroup)
view == localhubGroups && (viewItem == group || viewItem == forgottenGroup || viewItem == branchHeadGroup || viewItem == branchHeadReturnGroup)

localhub.enabled.markdownDescription: **Enable LocalHub** — automatically saves history of all file changes

localhub.pythonPath.markdownDescription: **Python Path** — usually no need to change. Specify full path only if Python is not found automatically

localhub.serverPort.markdownDescription: **Server Port** — change only if the port is occupied by another program

localhub.reliability.mode.markdownDescription: **Reliability Mode** — classic keeps legacy behavior, resilient adds watchdog/recovery safeguards

localhub.reliability.controlTimeoutMs.markdownDescription: **Resilient: Control Timeout (ms)** — timeout for daemon control operations (`0` disables timeout)

localhub.reliability.healthIntervalMs.markdownDescription: **Resilient: Health Interval (ms)** — watchdog health check interval

localhub.reliability.healthFailThreshold.markdownDescription: **Resilient: Health Fail Threshold** — consecutive failed checks before automatic recovery

localhub.lhlMode.markdownDescription: **LHL Mode** — automatic grouping of changes after idle timeout

localhub.lhl.timeoutMinutes.markdownDescription: **LHL: Timeout** — minutes of inactivity before auto-grouping

localhub.lhl.threshold.markdownDescription: **LHL: Threshold** — number of saves before auto-grouping

localhub.lhl.namePattern.markdownDescription: **LHL: Name Pattern** — pattern for auto-generated group names. {count}, {time}, {date}, {files}

localhub.aiAutoCommit.markdownDescription: **AI Auto-Commit** — automatically confirm pending group when AI agent (Storm Code, Roo Code) completes a task

localhub.sandbox.enabled.markdownDescription: **Enable Shadow Sandboxes** — expose shadow sandbox creation and management commands in the UI

localhub.branches.showZombieByDefault.markdownDescription: **Show Zombie Branches by Default** — automatically show deleted (zombie) branches in Branches panel

localhub.groups.showZombieByDefault.markdownDescription: **Show Zombie TM Groups by Default** — automatically show deleted TM groups in TM Groups panel

localhub.autoSave.markdownDescription: **Auto Save** — automatically create snapshots when files change

localhub.debounceMs.markdownDescription: **Auto Save Debounce** — milliseconds to wait after last keystroke before creating snapshot. 2000 = 2 seconds

localhub.idleCheckpointMinutes.markdownDescription: **Idle Checkpoint** — minutes of inactivity before creating a snapshot of all unsaved files. 0 = disabled

localhub.maxVersionsPerFile.markdownDescription: **Max Versions Per File** — how many snapshots to keep per file. Older versions are auto-deleted

localhub.enableGlobalWatcher.markdownDescription: **Global Watcher** — monitor files outside VS Code

localhub.globalWatcher.bridgeOnProjectOp.markdownDescription: **Global Watcher Bridge on Project Open** — allow the Global Watcher bridge feature to sync effective current changes into LocalHub when a project is opened

localhub.globalWatcher.gitStyleDiskVerif.markdownDescription: **Git-Style Disk Verify on Project Open** — after the bridge step, run a full project disk verify against the current LocalHub logical state when a project is opened

localhub.globalWatchPaths.markdownDescription: **Global Watch Paths** — visible from any project

localhub.localWatchPaths.markdownDescription: **Local Watch Paths** — visible only in this project

localhub.excludePatterns.markdownDescription: **Exclude Patterns** — these folders will NOT be saved to history. Useful for node_modules, .git and other heavy folders

localhub.backup.centralPath.markdownDescription: **Backup Path** — where to save backups. Leave empty = default AppData folder. Can use USB drive or network path

localhub.backup.retentionDays.markdownDescription: **Backup Retention Days** — old versions are auto-deleted. 0 = keep forever

localhub.backup.enabled.markdownDescription: **Enable Backups** — backup copies in case of disk failure or accidental project deletion

enumDescriptions: On VS Code startup — auto-delete old versions
localhub.backup.autoCleanup.markdownDescription: **Auto Cleanup** — choose when to auto-delete old snapshots

localhub.trash.retentionDays.markdownDescription: **Trash Retention Days** — deleted files can be restored within this period. 0 = keep forever

localhub.github.enabled.markdownDescription: **Enable GitHub Sync** — upload project to cloud for access from other computers

localhub.github.token.markdownDescription: **GitHub Token** — your personal access token (starts with ghp_). [Get a token](https://github.com/settings/tokens)

localhub.github.repo.markdownDescription: **GitHub Repository** — repository name on GitHub (e.g. my-project)

localhub.github.branch.markdownDescription: **GitHub Branch** — which branch to push files to (usually main)

localhub.github.syncOnConfirm.markdownDescription: **Auto Sync on Confirm** — automatically push to GitHub after each group confirm. If off — will ask

localhub.marketplaceUrl.markdownDescription: **Marketplace URL** — server address for downloading plugins. Default is local server

localhub.git.syncOnConfirm.markdownDescription: **Git: Auto Commit** — automatically create git commit when confirming a LocalHub group

localhub.git.autoPush.markdownDescription: **Git: Auto Push** — automatically git push after commit

localhub.git.commitPrefix.markdownDescription: **Git: Commit Prefix** — prepend this text to every commit message (e.g. [LocalHub])

localhub.agentDiary.enabled.markdownDescription: **Agent Diary: Enabled** — record action history for AI agents in `.localhub/agent/`

localhub.agentDiary.rotationDays.markdownDescription: **Agent Diary: Log Rotation** — delete diary files older than N days. 0 = never delete

localhub.treeDiff.semanticAnalysis.markdownDescription: **Semantic Code Insights** — detect and annotate changes to functions, classes, interfaces and other code symbols. Shows what was added, removed or modified at the semantic level

localhub.treeDiff.contextLines.markdownDescription: **Context Lines** — number of unchanged lines shown around each change for context. More lines help understand surrounding code, fewer lines keep diffs compact

localhub.treeDiff.maxChainLength.markdownDescription: **Version Chain Depth** — maximum number of version transitions (v1→v2→v3…) to display per file. Limits long histories to keep the view responsive

localhub.treeDiff.includeBaseline.markdownDescription: **Show Baseline Version** — include the version before the group as a reference point. Shows what the code looked like before the group's changes began

enumDescriptions: Show QuickPick menu with all options (Diff Navigator / WebView / Latest / Pick version)
Skip menu → open Diff Navigator directly (Accept/Reject)
Skip menu → open All Diffs WebView directly
localhub.treeDiff.defaultViewMode.markdownDescription: **Default View Mode** — what happens when you click Show Tree Diff button

localhub.treeDiff.reviewMode.markdownDescription: **Interactive Review** — enable Accept / Reject buttons on each diff hunk for interactive code review

localhub.treeDiff.autoExpandHunks.markdownDescription: **Auto-Expand Hunks** — automatically show diff content when a file card is opened. When off, hunks start collapsed and must be clicked to expand

localhub.treeDiff.lazyLoading.markdownDescription: **Lazy Loading (MemRef)** — load file list instantly, fetch diff content on demand via `mem://` references. Dramatically reduces initial load time for large groups (e.g. 14 files × 224 changes = instant instead of 5-20 sec)

localhub.icons.theme.markdownDescription: **Icon Theme** — file icon style in Tree Diff and other webview panels. 10 themes available

scripts.vscode:prepublish: node -e "console.log('LocalHub public release: using prebuilt runtime bundle')"
scripts.compile: node -e "console.log('LocalHub public release: compile is not used; runtime bundle is already prepared')"
